topic: ‘Another internet is possible’: Norway rails against ‘enshit.

framework.structure: [Number] + [Category of Thing] + ['that feel illegal to know'] + [Implied restricted access]
framework.trigger: Information asymmetry — viewer gains access to knowledge others don't have
framework.example: 4 websites that feel illegal to know about in 2026.

script.hook: 4 websites that feel illegal to know about in 2026.
script.body: Most people scroll past these tools every day without realising they exist. Once you know about them, you cannot un-know them.
script.cta: Comment KNEW if you already knew this.
